search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: Are you an aquaholic? Doctors are always advising us to drink more water but in fact drinking too much can be even worse... We've been told it can boost concentration and keep headaches at bay, but experts are now questioning the health benefits of drinking water. It's suggested that the recommended amount may vary.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses hydration and water intake, not content about strategies or information to improve athletic performance. It is not relevant to the query 'how to get better at sports.'
